hooks.command: jq -r '[.tool_input.content, .tool_input.new_string] | map(select(.)) | join("\n")' | perl -CSD -0777 -ne 'print q[{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"em dash/en dash blocked; use a hyphen -"}}] if /[\x{2014}\x{2013}]/'
